mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRAINER ( user_id, trainer_type, gym_id, gym_join_code, business_registration_num, br_file, has_homeGym, visit_service, description, address, address_detail, postcode, latitude, longitude, approval_status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{trainerType}, #{gymId}, #{gymJoinCode}, #{businessRegistrationNum}, #{brFile}, #{hasHomeGym}, #{visitService}, #{description}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{postcode}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.user_id, t.trainer_type, t.gym_id, t.gym_join_code, t.business_registration_num, t.br_file, t.has_homeGym, t.visit_service, t.description, t.address, t.address_detail, t.postcode, t.latitude, t.longitude, t.approval_status, t.is_verified, u.name, u.nickname, u.email, u.profile_image AS profileImg FROM TRAINER t JOIN USER u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.id = #{trainerId}

SELECT t.id, t.user_id, t.trainer_type, t.gym_id, t.gym_join_code, t.business_registration_num, t.br_file, t.has_homeGym, t.visit_service, t.description, t.address, t.address_detail, t.postcode, t.latitude, t.longitude, t.approval_status, t.is_verified, u.name, u.nickname, u.email, u.profile_image AS profileImg FROM TRAINER t JOIN USER u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = #{email} AND u.is_deleted = 0

SELECT t.id, t.user_id, t.trainer_type, t.gym_id, t.has_homeGym, t.visit_service, t.description, t.address, t.latitude, t.longitude, t.approval_status, t.is_verified, u.name, u.nickname, u.email, u.profileImg FROM TRAINER t JOIN USER u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.id DESC

SELECT t.id, t.user_id, t.trainer_type, t.gym_id, t.description, t.approval_status, t.is_verified, u.name, u.nickname, u.email, u.profileImg FROM TRAINER t JOIN USER u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.gym_id = #{gymId} AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TRAINER SET approval_status = #{approvalStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM TRAINER WHERE id = #{trainerId}
